examples: The menu features roast meats and poultry.
Contaminants found in poultry will also be found in their eggs.
Farmers often give penicillin to beef and poultry, and because of this, penicillin has been found in the milk of treated cows.
Several years ago regulators finally permitted irradiation of pork, poultry, fruits, vegetables, spices and grains.
Away from the factory floor, worries about unsafe poultry are already high in China.
